title: Sources: Bellingham not confrontational with Ayew
summary: Jude Bellingham avoided a red card during England's goalless draw with Ghana because his mouth-covering gesture in a verbal exchange with Jordan Ayew was deemed non-confrontational. Sources confirm the incident did not warrant disciplinary action despite initial scrutiny.
content: Jude Bellingham avoided a red card for covering his mouth in a verbal confrontation with Jordan Ayew during England's goalless draw with Ghana because it was "not in a confrontational manner," sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士:贝林汉姆与阿耶乌互动不具对抗性

title: Raphinha will give 'everything' to return at WCup

summary: Daniel Munoz's deflected goal secured Colombia's advancement to the 2026 World Cup knockout stage with a victory over DR Congo, confirming their place in the last 32.
content: Daniel Munoz's deflected strike is enough for Colombia to beat DR Congo and secure their place in the 2026 World Cup knockout stage.

zh.title: 哥伦比亚战胜刚果民主共和国晋级32强
zh.summary: 丹尼尔·穆尼奥斯的偏转球破门帮助哥伦比亚击败刚果民主共和国，确保了他们在2026年世界杯淘汰赛中的席位，确认了他们进入32强的位置。

title: Ancelotti's quest to end Brazil's 24-year wait for World Cup glory
summary: Carlo Ancelotti leads Brazil in their World Cup campaign aimed at ending a 24-year drought without a tournament title, with the decisive final group game against Scotland looming. BBC Scotland examines the Italian manager's mission.
content: BBC Scotland's Andy Burke looks at Carlo Ancelotti and his mission at Brazil before their final Group C game against Scotland.

zh.title: 安切洛蒂终结巴西24年世界杯冠军梦的征程
zh.summary: 卡洛·安切洛蒂率领巴西参加世界杯，目标是结束24年没有锦标赛冠军的困境。与苏格兰的关键小组最后一战迫在眉睫。BBC苏格兰对这位意大利主帅的任务进行了分析。

title: No extra revenue for Fifa from hydration breaks - Infantino
summary: FIFA president Gianni Infantino clarifies that World Cup hydration breaks are "purely a sporting matter" without generating additional revenue for the organization, addressing concerns about the controversial practice.
content: Hydration breaks at the World Cup are "purely a sporting matter" and bring "no additional revenue for Fifa", says president Gianni Infantino.

zh.title: 因凡蒂诺：补水休息不为FIFA带来额外收入
zh.summary: FIFA主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺澄清，世界杯补水休息是"纯粹的体育问题"，不会为该组织产生额外收入，以此回应对这一争议性举措的关切。

title: Quiz: How well do you know birthday boy Messi at World Cups?
summary: As Lionel Messi celebrates his 39th birthday while performing well at the World Cup, this quiz tests fan knowledge of his tournament history and legacy.
content: Argentina great Lionel Messi turns 39 today and has been lighting up the World Cup this summer, but how well do you know his journey so far?

zh.title: 测验：你对寿星梅西的世界杯知识了解多少？
zh.summary: 当莱昂内尔·梅西在世界杯上表现出色的同时庆祝39岁生日时，这份测验考查了球迷对他的赛事历史和传奇的了解程度。

title: Croatia earn narrow win to knock out Panama
summary: Croatia defeated Panama to secure their first group stage points and remain in contention for the knockout round, while Panama is eliminated from the tournament. The narrow victory keeps Croatia's last-32 hopes alive.
content: Croatia remain in contention for a last-32 spot at the World Cup after earning their first points in Group L with a win over Panama, who are knocked out of the World Cup following the loss.

zh.title: 克罗地亚险胜巴拿马晋级
zh.summary: 克罗地亚击败巴拿马，获得小组赛首场胜利，保持在淘汰赛的争夺中，而巴拿马遭到淘汰。这场险胜让克罗地亚的32强希望仍然存活。

title: Silly tackle, bad reaction - Tuchel defends Bellingham after Queiroz row
summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel defends midfielder Jude Bellingham after a heated confrontation with Ghana boss Carlos Queiroz during their World Cup match, highlighting tensions between the teams.
content: England manager Thomas Tuchel defends Jude Bellingham after the midfielder is involved in a heated row with Ghana boss Carlos Queiroz.

zh.title: 图赫尔在克尔罗兹争执后为贝林厄姆辩护
zh.summary: 英格兰主帅托马斯·图赫尔在世界杯比赛中与加纳主帅卡洛斯·克尔罗兹发生激烈对峙后，为中场球员朱德·贝林厄姆进行辩护，凸显了两队之间的紧张关系。

title: No need to panic for England - but this was a reality check
summary: England's goalless draw with Ghana serves as a reality check rather than cause for alarm, according to analyst Phil McNulty, demonstrating the team's need to improve despite strong tournament form overall.
content: England's drab goalless draw with Ghana is no cause to panic - but it does serve as a reality check, writes Phil McNulty.

zh.title: 英格兰无需恐慌——但这是一次现实检视
zh.summary: 根据分析师菲尔·麦克纳尔蒂的说法，英格兰与加纳的无进球平局是一次现实检视，而非惊恐的原因，表明尽管球队整体赛事表现强劲，仍需改进。
